title: SEBA Assam HSLC Result 2026

detail.title: SEBA Assam HSLC Result 2026
detail.short_info: Assam HSLC Result 2026 will be out on 10 April at sebaonline.org. Students can check and download their SEBA Assam HSLC result using roll number and captcha code here.

content.text: The Assam HSLC Examination 2026 was conducted by the Assam State School Education Board (ASSEB), Division-I, formerly known as SEBA, from 10 February 2026 to 27 February 2026. This year Over 4.38 lakh students appeared for the Class 10 board exam across Assam, and the result is expected to be released in April 2026.

Students who appeared in the High School Leaving Certificate Examination 2026 are eagerly waiting for their result. Once the Assam HSLC Result 2026 is declared, students will be able to check their result and download the marksheet online from the official website. For the latest updates, students should keep visiting this page regularly.

rows: SEBA / Assam State School Education Board

content.text: Use the official websites to access the Assam HSLC Result 2026 without delay. These portals will help students check results and board updates easily.
The Assam HSLC Result 2026 is expected to be declared on 10 April 2026. Students should stay connected to the official portals for the latest result notification.

The Assam HSLC exams were held from 10 February to 27 February 2026, and the result is scheduled for 10 April 2026. Reports also indicate that the result may be released in the morning, with some sources mentioning 10:00 AM as the expected time.
SEBA Assam Board Class 10 Result 2026 Link

links.text: SEBA Assam Board Class 10 Result 2026 Link

sections.heading: How to Check Assam HSLC Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official website of SEBA, sebaonline.org.
Click on the link for Assam HSLC Result 2026.
Enter your roll number and captcha code.
Submit the details and view your result on screen.
Download and print the provisional marksheet for future use.
The online result will display provisional marksheet details.
It will include the student’s name.
It will show the roll number.
Subject-wise marks will be available.
The total marks will be shown.
The result status will also be mentioned.
The original marksheet is usually issued later by the respective schools.
Students should save the downloaded copy safely for future use.
Students who are not satisfied with their marks may apply for rechecking or revaluation, as per board rules.
Compartment exam details are usually announced later, if applicable.
Students should keep checking official updates after the result is declared.
